name_en: 💖Complete with original green box packaging💖【New】The GG Ophidia series blends Gucci's heritage with modern design to present a striking new piece. This wallet is crafted from grey and black GG Supreme canvas, accented with palladium-toned double G hardware, making the design even more eye-catching. Grey and black GG Supreme canvas, grey leather trim, palladium-toned double G hardware, removable wrist strap (13cm high), zip closure.
